hook.text: Do you have questions about endometriosis or adenomyosis?
hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: Curiosity and validation for those experiencing symptoms
hook.target_audience_raw: People with endometriosis or adenomyosis, or those suspecting they have it

main_claim.text: We have developed an online clinic for endometriosis/adenomyosis that helps you understand your symptoms, explore management options (medical, surgical, physiotherapy), and create a personalized plan to improve your quality of life.

supporting_explanation.summary: The video describes an online clinic staffed by a Clinical Nurse Specialist (Liz Bruen) with over 20 years of experience. The clinic assesses pain levels, past investigations, fatigue, and other symptoms. After assessment, a plan is developed to help the patient understand their symptoms and choose appropriate management options tailored to their lifestyle.

funnel_rationale: The video educates viewers about a specific service (online CNS clinic) and encourages booking an appointment, typical of middle-of-funnel content that bridges awareness and conversion.

cta.wording: Book your appointment with her, link in bio.
cta.value_exchange_raw: Get expert guidance from an experienced endometriosis CNS

format_raw: TikTok video with spoken monologue and onscreen text
